title: Narrative review of metabolomics in cardiovascular disease.
author: Muller J Bertsch T Volke J Schmid A Klingbeil R Metodiev Y Karaca B Kim SH Lindner S Schupp T Kittel M Poschet G Akin I Behnes M
content: S-EPMC8107570 PMC8107570 Narrative review of metabolomics in cardiovascular disease. Cardiovascular diseases are accompanied by disorders in the cardiac metabolism. Furthermore, comorbidities often associated with cardiovascular disease can alter systemic and myocardial metabolism contributing
